text_annotations.text: FPWM version of the LMR51420YFDDCR for less output ripple at low voltage and more consistency but less efficient

Switches up to 4A (TPS2117) from +5V_USB or +5V_BUCK to +5V. Prefers buck over USB, threshold voltage is about 3.5V. The threshold voltage is low to prevent accidental switchover to USB during peak consumption (worst case in flight). Emergency diode for if that happens during flight.

observations: +5V: highest SRF is 29.06 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+5V_BUCK: highest SRF is 1.28 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+10V: highest SRF is 1.28 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+3.3V: highest SRF is 1.52 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+BATT: highest SRF is 2.45 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+1.8V_GYRO: highest SRF is 1.52 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
